zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Verney於大約1344年出生在英國奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德時，他的父親William de Verney56歲，母親Alice Elena Langley45歲。他於1368年與Elizabeth de Bereham在英國英格蘭奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在英國諾薩普頓史爾白費爾德享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Verney于大约1344年出生在英国奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德时，他的父亲William de Verney56岁，母亲Alice Elena Langley45岁。他于1368年与Elizabeth de Bereham在英国英格兰奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年在英国諾薩普頓史爾白費爾德享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Verney was born about 1344, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William de Verney, was 56 and his mother, Alice Elena Langley, was 45. He married Elizabeth de Bereham in 1368, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Verney est né environ 1344, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Verney, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Alice Elena Langley, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Bereham en 1368, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, à Byfield, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Verney um 1344 in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Verney 56 und seine Mutter Alice Elena Langley 45. Er hat 1368 in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Bereham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Verney è nato il circa 1344 nel Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William de Verney, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Alice Elena Langley, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Bereham nel 1368, nel Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1400, nel Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Verney(이)가 대략 1344년 영국 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Verney(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Elena Langley(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 Elizabeth de Bereham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 노르섬프토실르 비필드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Verney nasceu aproximadamente 1344, em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Verney, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Alice Elena Langley, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Bereham em 1368, em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Verney родился около 1344 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Verney было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Elena Langley, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Bereham в 1368 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности бифиелд, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Verney nació aproximadamente 1344, en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Verney, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Alice Elena Langley, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Bereham en 1368, en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1400, en Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
